findings.fix_prompt: Check that all API endpoints, images, and external resources load correctly. There are 6 failing requests to fix.

findings.title: 2 form(s) detected — verify labels
findings.description: Found 2 form(s) on the page. Ensure all form inputs have associated <label> elements for accessibility.
findings.fix_prompt: Review all form inputs and ensure each one has an associated <label>. Use the 'for' attribute matching the input's 'id'.

summary: Basic technical audit completed (AI analysis was unavailable). Found 2 issue(s) from automated checks.
bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://practice.automationtesting.in and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [HIGH] 6 failed network request(s)
   Fix: Check that all API endpoints, images, and external resources load correctly. There are 6 failing requests to fix.

2. [LOW] 2 form(s) detected — verify labels
   Fix: Review all form inputs and ensure each one has an associated <label>. Use the 'for' attribute matching the input's 'id'.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.
